title: The Quiet Path
intro: A gentle, no-pressure Adventure. There are no wrong choices — explore at your own pace, and go back any time.

clearing.title: A Clearing in the Woods
text: You step into a calm Clearing. The Light is soft and the air is still.
Two paths lead onward, and there is no rush to choose.

stream.title: A Slow Stream
text: The mossy path leads to a slow Stream. The Sound of water is steady and easy to follow.
You could rest by the water, or follow the Stream further in.

meadow.title: An Open Meadow
text: The path opens into a wide Meadow. The Sky is large and quiet overhead.
You feel like you could stay here a while.

choices.label: Lie down and watch the Sky

rest.title: A Moment of Rest
text: You settle in and let your shoulders drop. Nothing here needs anything from you.
When you are ready, the Adventure will be here again.
